title: mazus miquelii f. contractus
intro: Mazus miquelii f. contractus, also known as the Chinese alpine joy or small creeping mazus, is a low-growing, spreading perennial plant native to China and Japan. This plant has been traditionally used in herbal medicine for its medicinal properties, including its anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Mazus miquelii f. contractus include its ability to promote wound healing, reduce fever, and alleviate digestive issues. In herbal preparations, the plant is often used in infusions, decoctions, or as a dried powder, and is typically combined with other herbs to enhance its medicinal properties.
